query:
SELECT
                COALESCE(s.tags, ARRAY[]::text[]) AS "tags!: Vec<String>",
                s.bpm AS "bpm?",
                s.key AS "music_key?"
            FROM samples s
            JOIN descargas d ON d.sample_id = s.id
            WHERE d.usuario_id = $1
              AND s.estado = 'activo'
              AND s.eliminado_en IS NULL
